extraction.one_line_summary: DÉMARE Arnaud won after FDJ controlled from 4km out while Kristoff blocked SAGAN off Quickstep's train in the closing meters
tactical_patterns: FDJ controlled from 4km out, unusually early but sustained through Bora's counter-move, avoiding typical quick-step ambush
Kristoff deliberately pushed Sagan into wind off Quickstep train, disrupting his sprint and gifting Démare positioning
Aqua-Blue Pro Continental team successfully infiltrated every breakaway of tour, revealing aggressive most-combative jersey strategy

rider_signals.DÉMARE Arnaud: positive: perfectly executed wheel-following onto Gaviria after FDJ's risky early leadout held together
rider_signals.KRISTOFF Alexander: negative: desperate blocking tactics against Sagan suggest pressure for pre-Tour result rather than confidence
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: freelancing without train resulted in getting blocked and eliminated from sprint contention
rider_signals.GREIPEL André: negative: finished 10th, two places behind GC rider Porte, indicating poor pre-Tour form
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: negative: finished 10th without leadout, reveals Sunweb lacks sprint organization for split GC/sprint roster
rider_signals.GAVIRIA Fernando: neutral: Quickstep's late-race positioning worked perfectly but lost straight drag race to Démare
